summary.text:
Compute a simple non-cryptographic hash of a string value.

The algorithm converts the input to its ASCII-code string representation,
pads it to

, then reduces it to a single
numeric hash via a weighted sum of character codes.
The value to hash (converted to string).
Target length for the padded intermediate string (defaults to 26).

summary.text:
directory exists at the given path,
indicating the directory is (or is inside) a Git repository.

content.text:
```ts
import { isGitInit } from "@wtasnorg/node-lib/git";

isGitInit("/my/project"); // true or false
```

summary.text:
Check whether a value is a JavaScript primitive
(

content.text:
```ts
isPrimitive(42);        // true
isPrimitive("hello");   // true
isPrimitive({});         // false
isPrimitive(null);       // true
```

summary.text: Check whether a value is an array containing only primitive values.

content.text: is an array and every element is a primitive.

```ts
isPrimitiveArray([1, "two", null]); // true
isPrimitiveArray([1, { a: 2 }]);    // false
isPrimitiveArray("not-array");      // false
```
